properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v3 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In awe of You we worship And stand amazed at Your great love We're changed from glory to glory We set our hearts on You our God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: Now Your presence fills this place Be exalted in our praise As we worship I believe You are near :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: /: Blessing and honour And glory and power Forever, forever :/ x6

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In awe of You we worship
